figures.caption: Figure 1: Macro-F1 (mean ± SD, 3 seeds) for all eleven model variants across four tasks. IWN variants (shaded) achieve the highest average F1.

Table 3: Main results: macro-F1 mean± SD over three seeds. † = SURGELLM family. Bold = best per column. T(s) = mean wall-clock training time on 2×T4 GPUs. ∆ = Avg F1 vs. Baseline-RoBERTa. ⋆ = early stopping triggered.
Table 6: Training dynamics summary (seed-0 representative). ∆Loss = (Ep. 1 loss) − (final loss).
Table 7: Component ablation across backbones. P = prefix, G = gate, E = extended training, I = IWN. ∆ = Avg F1 vs. same-backbone baseline. Bold = positive.

Figure 6: Leave-one-out F1 drop per surgical indicator group (SURGELLM-G-RoBERTa). Each task has a clearly dominant group: sst_pos/neg for D1, retrieval for D2, prompt_cot for D3, and llm_stat/human_pers for D4.
Table 13: Full hyperparameter configuration. LR = learning rate; EP = max epochs; BS = per-GPU batch size; GA = gradient accumulation; MaxL = max sequence length; WU = warmup fraction.
Table 17: Reviewer-to-revision crosswalk. R = revision implemented in this camera-ready version. ✓ = fully addressed; ∼ = partially addressed with future work note.
